name: Buckshot Beans/Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover beans with water and let soak overnight.
2. Drain beans, discarding soaking water.
3. In the crockpot, cover beans with fresh water and add remaining ingredients.
4. Cook on LOW for 6-8 hours, until beans are tender.
5. Taste beans; if necessary, add salt (do not add salt at the beginning of cooking time as it will make the beans tough).
